goal: Agents measure skill/harness changes with evidence (ACCEPT/REVERT), not vibes — including TDD failing-case-first.

primaryKpi.name: suite_pass_rate
primaryKpi.servesGoal: Self-test + case grades stay green while improving the skill

guardrails.name: no_harness_cheat
guardrails.rule: do not edit cases/graders mid-experiment to pass

guardrails.name: tdd_case_present
guardrails.rule: tdd-red-green case exists and passes self-test

guardrails.name: held_out_discipline
guardrails.rule: ACCEPT only with held-out / guardrails language in Run reports

budget: self-test always; optional --case spot checks; skill-review 0 ERROR
decisionRule: ACCEPT if suite_pass_rate >= 0.85 AND skill_review_error_count == 0 AND guardrails pass; else CONTINUE or REVERT
